ab: sesane masaemesemini ka ’abee ami kigili mwa da’ane.
ch: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother is going home this evening.

ab: kake si takawngo ka wamikiname talangalangaane lwangay na tawkoko. paagele do’o na ki’awbo pakane giliya.
ch: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐給弟弟。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: waibate kiname talangalangaane na lacenge, madraw na maagi’i na lacenge.
ch: 我們經過了菜攤，有好多新鮮的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: lalangay kiname na ’ingcay toba’a si ningzingi.
ch: 我們買了空心菜、山藥和胡蘿蔔。
en: We bought water spinach, yams and carrots.

ab: cigi’ane walangalangay na madro lawpange ka la’apobaka, “pangodralili si somomo ka malimeme. lwangaa ’angititi’ici.”
ch: 旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜。買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: walangay kiname na pangodrale si somomo.
laibate kiname talangalangaane na bwate, lawpange la’apobaka, “mani langayaniso? sesane na tawkoko ka tawmomo mamitee, sesesane ka too na idai na payso.
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼?今天的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today's chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: takawngo ka makocingay laya, lakiboboo lawpangane. doo myaso tipadodoo ’angititi’ici.
ch: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆可不可以便宜一點。
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: makasi lawpange ka la’apobaka, “mapadodoonga, dooiyanga oalralra.”
ch: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: cigi’ane lawpange la’apobaka, “ngoalra lwangaa ka’angili, ka’angili ka tawmomo si lakapadodoo.”
ch: 隔壁的老闆說：「來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。」
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: biilanenga lalangay kiname na tawkoko si ka’ange, la’abee kiname do’o pasiéte cekei.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.
After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: la dingva ki gili pa’abee, betai ka i’isasadra, sakasokobanenga ka doo mikake ’abee mya.
ch: 弟弟打電話回來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日才回來。
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn't take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: takawngo ka la’apobaka do’onga ’akathay nakay, kokwava tatakaese kwane.
ch: 奶奶說已經煮了這麼多，叫大家一起來吃吧!
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let's eat together!

ch: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
